scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,blue "npm run dev --workspace repairatech-api" "npm run dev --workspace repairatech-web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace repairatech-api && npm run build --workspace repairatech-web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace repairatech-api && npm run typecheck --workspace repairatech-web
